    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack
    RarityManager.applyRarity(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item, Rarity rarity, boolean isCustom)
    Applies a rarity to an item, updating NBT, name, and lore.

    RarityManager.updateRarityLore(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item, Rarity rarity)
